title: Former President Clinton knocks Trump at DNC
shortDescription: Former President Bill Clinton painted a bleak picture of Donald Trump while speaking at the Democratic National Convention.

title: Rep. Jeffries says Trump like an old boyfriend
shortDescription: Rep. Hakeem Jeffries, during his DNC convention address, said America 'broke up' with Donald Trump and never "ever getting back together."

title: Watch Bill Clinton endorse Harris at 2024 DNC
shortDescription: Former President Bill Clinton passed the Democrats' torch to presidential nominee Kamala Harris at the 2024 DNC. Watch the full speech

title: Hakeem Jeffries calls Donald Trump an ex-boyfriend in DNC speech
shortDescription: House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries takes the stage on the third night of the DNC

title: Congresista de Texas a Trump sobre la frontera 'no sabes nada'
shortDescription: La congresista de Texas Veronica Escobar hablo sobre su experiencia creciendo en la frontera entre El Paso y Ciudad Juárez.

title: DNC speeches: Olivia Julianna encourages Gen Z to vote
shortDescription: Olivia Julianna spoke from the Democratic National Convention floor Wednesday. She called on Gen Z to vote. Watch the video of her speech.
